items.title: Study finds iPhone may explain up to half of U.S. fertility decline
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Cuba tourism collapses as US pressure campaign bites
items.dek: The number of foreign visitors is down by 58% compared to last year, Cuban officials say, amid sanctions and an effective oil blockade.
items.body: The number of foreign visitors is down by 58% compared to last year, Cuban officials say, amid sanctions and an effective oil blockade.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Russian artist and Putin critic shot dead in Poland
items.dek: Robert Kuzovkov, who used the pseudonym Semyon Skrepetsky, has been known for his caricatures of politicians including Vladimir Putin.
items.body: Robert Kuzovkov, who used the pseudonym Semyon Skrepetsky, has been known for his caricatures of politicians including Vladimir Putin.
items.author: IriLine Desk
